posts.author: mabel.vargas (Mabel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Team,

To improve time tracking and make workflows more efficient, I suggest the following enhancements:

  1. Permanent Pop-Up for Active Time Tracking:
  • Keep the item/sub-item with the active “play” button visible as a pop-up to ensure better tracking and focus.
  1. Limit Play Activation to Assigned Owners:
  • Only assigned users should be able to start time tracking, preventing accidental activations.
  1. Allow Multiple Users to Track Time Simultaneously:
  • Enable multiple assigned executors to track time at the same time for better collaboration.

These improvements will help teams stay more organized, focused, and productive. I appreciate your support and feedback!

Best,
Mabel
